name: Team Warner
subject: Our chance to turn the Senate BLUE.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
Mitch McConnell is worried.
|
---

| | | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da85/53d9897e/55936c4c/1c881a6b/142711098/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-wininva?refcode=20200925_f_1_nd__826__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---

Derek,

Mitch McConnell is worried. Senate Republicans know their majority is in danger, and they're doing everything they can to hang on to power. That's why they're trying to force through a Supreme Court nominee to replace the late Justice Ruth Bader Ginsberg -- breaking their own precedent, set in 2016.

**And it's why their leaked memo calls on Republican mega-donors to spend big to defeat Democrats this fall.**

It's clear that Donald Trump sees Virginia as a path to expanding the electoral map and helping the GOP hang on to power. That's why the President is targeting Virginia with a big rally tonight. He's already tweeting that he predicts a "BIG" Republican victory from the top of the ticket down to Mark Warner's race.

Donald Trump and Mitch McConnell have a good reason to be worried -- we have momentum on our side. On Super Tuesday, a record number of Democrats cast their ballots in Virginia. But we can't take anything for granted. We need to keep that momentum going all the way to Election Day to secure victory for Joe Biden, Mark Warner, and Democrats all the way down the ticket.

**Will you chip in now to fight back against the Trump campaign in Virginia and support our campaign's grassroots voter turnout efforts?**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

No matter what the polls say, the only way to guarantee a Democratic victory this November is to out-work, out-raise, and out-vote the Trump GOP. Despite the pandemic, Mark Warner is working around the clock to reach voters from every corner of the Commonwealth, but he needs our help to win this November and ensure we have a Democratic majority in the Senate next year.

[**Mitch McConnell may be at risk of losing his majority, but we can't take anything for granted, Derek. Please give what you can today to help Mark Warner win and keep Virginia blue.**](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da85/53d9897e/55936c4c/1c881a6b/142711098/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyNiJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-wininva?refcode=20200925_f_1_nd__826__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")

name: Georgia HQ - Jon Ossoff for Senate
subject: The attacks keep piling up
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JON OSSOFF FOR SENATE
body:
The GOP is spending millions on these |
---
They just don't stop, friend.

David Perdue and his right-wing buddies are spending millions of dollars on all kinds of attack ads against Jon Ossoff. Some of them are false or misleading, some are truly offensive, and some are just downright childish.

**These are just a few examples -- and they just keep piling up.**
[](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f8c/5b2c1286/3ae3bff9/25f3b377/2099617207/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_attack_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_25_attack_ads_img")
**[friend, can you chip in $20 right now to help us combat these vicious attacks?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f8c/5b2c1286/3ae3bff9/25f3b376/2099617207/VEsE/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_attack_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_25_attack_ads&amount=20")**
| | [YES, I'll donate $20 >>](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f8c/5b2c1286/3ae3bff9/25f3b376/2099617207/VEsF/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_attack_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_25_attack_ads&amount=20")
---

The anti Semitic ad that David Perdue's campaign launched over the summer was just the tip of the iceberg -- **they've been running brutal, cruel attack ads for MONTHS.**

And with Mitch McConnell and his friends spending $38 MILLION to help David Perdue's drowning campaign, **_we expect the attack ads will only increase._**

**Friend, we need to rise above this.** Jon Ossoff is running a campaign that brings out the very best of us, and that's what he will strive to do in the U.S. Senate, too.

**[Can you rush a donation right now to help us inject compassion back into our government?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f8c/5b2c1286/3ae3bff9/25f3b379/2099617207/VEsC/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_attack_ads?refcode=em_2020_09_25_attack_ads")**

name: Mark Warner for Virginia HQ
subject: 🚨BREAKING: Trump just endorsed Mark’s opponent 🚨
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
It's official: Donald Trump just endorsed Daniel Gade against Mark.
|
---

| | Derek, it's official: | **DONALD TRUMP JUST ENDORSED
MARK WARNER'S OPPONENT**
---
**[Contribute now to re-elect Mark Warner and protect the progress we've made in Virginia.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da87/53d9897e/558d46ce/1c881a4d/1843475268/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gadedjt?refcode=20200925_f_2_nd__818__&refcode2=ask1&amount=5")**

**_Virginians deserve better._** We need an independent fighter in the Senate, someone who is loyal to his constituents. That person is not Daniel Gade.

President Trump and Daniel Gade are two peas in a pod. See for yourself:
* As coronavirus cases soared across the country, Gade said, **" The president's leadership on this has been great."**

* He joined the president in dismissing urgent guidelines from public health experts, saying, **" Every time you put on your mask...this is what tyranny feels like."**

* And, just like Trump, **Daniel Gade opposes equal rights for LGBTQ+ Virginians, a woman 's right to choose, and Medicaid expansion**, which would give more Virginians access to affordable health care.

* Gade has also pushed back on being a "rubber stamp" for the Trump agenda, but he's already said that Trump's Supreme Court nominee should be confirmed. **Derek -- that person hasn't even been named yet, and Gade is already siding with Trump.**

**On every single issue, Daniel Gade is on Trump 's side -- not our side.** If he takes Mark's seat in November, we won't have a champion for every Virginian in the Senate -- we'll have a rubber stamp for Trump.
**[Pitch in to keep Mark in the Senate, working for us.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da87/53d9897e/558d46ce/1c881a4b/1843475268/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gadedjt?refcode=20200925_f_2_nd__818__&refcode2=ask2&amount=5")**
Thanks for your support. Together, we can protect the progress we've made in Virginia.

-- Team Warner
[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da87/53d9897e/558d46ce/1c881a49/1843475268/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgxOCJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-gadedjt?refcode=20200925_f_2_nd__818__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")

Our team is powered by hundreds of thousands of grassroots donations, and Sen. Cornyn's team knows that we've got people power behind us. So it's no surprise that special interests and corporate PACs are swooping in to try to bail out Sen. Cornyn -- after all, he's had their back the entire time he's been in office.

While they're pouring in hundreds of thousands of dollars, we're counting on small-dollar grassroots donors. MJ isn't taking money from corporate PACs because she wants it to be crystal clear: she answers to the _people._

**We 're in this race for the people of Texas, not the corporate mega-donors. [Pitch in just $1 to help us DEFEAT Sen. Friend,
The only thing standing between the American People and the agenda of the Radical Left is four more years of President Trump.

The truth is, if we do not secure a victory in November, Joe Biden and Kamala Harris will fundamentally alter the character of this great Nation.

We simply cannot let that happen.

Our FINAL End-of-Quarter Deadlinebefore the Election is just 4 days away, and it is CRITICAL that we finish strong. The President wants to make this our STRONGEST QUARTER EVER, and we need YOU to step up.

name: Kat Cammack
subject: That's Why
body:
I am proud to be pro-life
---
| | | | | | [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mSCm02K5PbUVEeESRBlmdfpQLX6UVyJizxfWmBidkLq3K9oOtfTt2RIz1Y2dI0UJS0QuW89isZZeEWfH1clSSjKBowH7ZGX6WdlONi-g7LkTSIVM9S7OxsBCIEWCHR_o4g==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)
---
| Patriot,
When I decided to run for Congress, I had one mission: to serve.
As a small business owner, Naval War College alumni, and wife to a first responder, I understand the values of hard work, dedication, and above all, life.
Why do any of us do what we do? Personally, I fight for the rights of the good people in our district not only to make Florida the greatest state in the nation, but to create a better future for our generations to come.
Our children are the future, and that includes the unborn. They all have rights, including the right to live.
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mSCm02K5PbUVEeESRBlmdfpQLX6UVyJizxfWmBidkLq3K9oOtfTt2RIz1Y2dI0UJS0QuW89isZZeEWfH1clSSjKBowH7ZGX6WdlONi-g7LkTSIVM9S7OxsBCIEWCHR_o4g==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)
---
| My mother had a choice when she got pregnant with me. The odds were against her, many were against me. But my mom understood the value of life, she loved me before she could even meet me, and she knew I would grow up and try to make this world a better place. So, she chose me, she chose life.
[Will you help me protect the rights of the unborn?](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mSCm02K5PbUVEeESRBlmdfpQLX6UVyJizxfWmBidkLq3K9oOtfTt2RIz1Y2dI0UJS0QuW89isZZeEWfH1clSSjKBowH7ZGX6WdlONi-g7LkTSIVM9S7OxsBCIEWCHR_o4g==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)
---
| | | [PROTECT THE UNBORN](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mSCm02K5PbUVEeESRBlmdfpQLX6UVyJizxfWmBidkLq3K9oOtfTt2RIz1Y2dI0UJS0QuW89isZZeEWfH1clSSjKBowH7ZGX6WdlONi-g7LkTSIVM9S7OxsBCIEWCHR_o4g==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)
---
| I am proud to be pro-life. Every life matters to me.
Respectfully,
---
| [ ](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mSCm02K5PbUVEeESRBlmdfpQLX6UVyJizxfWmBidkLq3K9oOtfTt2RIz1Y2dI0UJS0QuW89isZZeEWfH1clSSjKBowH7ZGX6WdlONi-g7LkTSIVM9S7OxsBCIEWCHR_o4g==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)
---
| Kat Cammack Republican Nominee for Congress, FL-03

---
|
---
| [www.KatforCongress.com](http://r20.rs6.net/tn.jsp?f=001fOLESu8japeviwVlEFt7xd4i-2crG5Uxsw5UB1vOlYgyJRo4wKE4mabBJoEqK9k2HzSNyRfovfrfn6Vv8-Y890jFTT2YkvlescYFhmkaY_F2owHDwLEBTDYEn0-3sZ7cme3B_3lzNQbSEIf4tPep_w==&c=0fkEGc8dJ4UjOKTcfmijnzAklS13u3SsxV9weyTrJP4l2vQJPsRtKg==&ch=KqEw-NqylucEoIxhmVlDvcF1c7k5v6OpDuALwABlnIvpG5xERNzo5Q==)

name: Francys Johnson, Former President of the Georgia NAACP
subject: This video says it all.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by GBP, www
body:
Friend,

WATCH THE VIDEO >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue]

“It didn’t start here, but it ends here.”

As a child, I remember reading the words of Frederick Douglass: "there is no progress without struggle." That immortal wisdom came from the yearning soul of a man so desperate to see change in his bitterly divided society that he used his time, talent, and treasure to secure the liberation of millions in chattel slavery. Waiting for someone else to act was not an option.

Friend, we cannot afford to wait on someone else to act any longer.

The current leadership in Georgia and in Washington are not concerned with real justice. You see that in the willingness of the U.S. Senate to ram through a Supreme Court Justice even while the voters are already voting. You see that in the courtrooms across America, where there is always a technicality, a lesser charge, a deal—each time, with justice denied. The America that generations since Douglass have fought to secure is now at stake.

The Georgia Blue Project’s mission is to galvanize voters and make sure when they turn out, they vote for Democrats up and down the ticket. We can flip Georgia blue and, by doing so, change the White House, the Senate majority in Washington and even break the Republican stranglehold on the Georgia State Legislature. When we vote all the way down the ballot, we can elect a new cadre of reformers to the local offices from sheriff to district attorney so that we can pass overdue police reform.

Friend, we cannot do this without your help. Can you TAKE ACTION now, and chip in $26—one dollar for every race we are targeting with ads from now until November—to help me accomplish this goal??

If you've stored your info with ActBlue, we'll process your contribution instantly:

Donate $26 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=26&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $50 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=50&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $100 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=100&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $250 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=250&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate $500 >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane=true&amount=500&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

Donate Another Amount >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane_other=true&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

The time is now. Thank you for taking action now to flip Georgia blue and usher in better government that truly represents and recognizes everyone.

—Francys Johnson

DONATE >> [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/flip-ga-blue?express_lane_other=true&refcode=it-ends-here-B]

name: Taylor Campaign
subject: There's no time to wait - 38 Days Out!!
body:
Trump Rally
---
| | | | | | Saturday, September 26th 2020
---
|
---
| Thank you, Mr. President!
---
| | |
---|---
|
In the President's words:
"a real warrior, a real hero: Scott Taylor."

Scott was honored to speak before the President and to be recognized at last night's rally! Thank you to everyone who attended and to all who tuned in from home.

This race for our district is of national importance. Our American values are under attack, as are our safety and livelihoods here in Virginia. With just 38 days remaining until Election Day, we need your involvement now.

name: Mondaire Jones
subject: Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Mondaire for Congress_
body:
Confirming someone this young and this extreme in their ideology to the Supreme Court would truly be a worst-case scenario.
#

Trump’s pick to replace Justice Ginsburg on the Supreme Court is Amy Coney Barrett, a 48-year-old, ultraconservative judge on the Seventh Circuit who has an absolutely horrifying record.
**Confirming someone so young and ideologically extreme to the Supreme Court would truly be a worst-case scenario.**
We cannot afford to have Judge Barrett on the Supreme Court, because:
* She thinks the Affordable Care Act is unconstitutional.
* She believes “abortion is always immoral” and would surely vote to overturn _Roe v. Wade_.
* She is hostile to LGBTQ+ civil rights and would undo marriage equality.
* She served on George W. Bush’s legal team after the 2000 election, so Trump wants her on the Court to cast the deciding vote to hand him another term.

Her nomination would be a direct attack on millions of Americans. We won't stand for it.
**If Republicans fill this seat, then the only way we can protect any of the progress we’ve made in the last several decades is to expand the Court by adding new justices.**
Now is not the time to complain and do nothing.
Now is the time to fight harder for our progressive values, and for our democracy, than ever before.
And you can count on me to always keep up this fight.
Onward,
Mondaire
**We need Mondaire in Congress to fight to expand the Court, protect our democracy, and build a better future.**

clean_body: Confirming someone this young and this extreme in their ideology to the Supreme Court would truly be a worst-case scenario. Trump’s pick to replace Justice Ginsburg on the Supreme Court is Amy Coney Barrett, a 48-year-old, ultraconservative judge on the Seventh Circuit who has an absolutely horrifying record. Confirming someone so young and ideologically extreme to the Supreme Court would truly be a worst-case scenario. We cannot afford to have Judge Barrett on the Supreme Court, because: She thinks the Affordable Care Act is unconstitutional. She believes “abortion is always immoral” and would surely vote to overturn Roe v. Wade. She is hostile to LGBTQ+ civil rights and would undo marriage equality. She served on George W. Bush’s legal team after the 2000 election, so Trump wants her on the Court to cast the deciding vote to hand him another term. Her nomination would be a direct attack on millions of Americans. We won't stand for it. If Republicans fill this seat, then the only way we can protect any of the progress we’ve made in the last several decades is to expand the Court by adding new justices. Now is not the time to complain and do nothing. Now is the time to fight harder for our progressive values, and for our democracy, than ever before. And you can count on me to always keep up this fight. Onward, Mondaire We need Mondaire in Congress to fight to expand the Court, protect our democracy, and build a better future. = = * | | | Paid for by Mondaire for Congress Mondaire For Congress P.O. subject: Join me as we celebrate two wonderful individuals!
body:
| | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/b41664ce190b/join-me-as-we-celebrate-two-wonderful-individuals?e=9f843ba602)
---
| |
---
| Dear Friend,

You are cordially invited to join me and Sen. Pam Helming as we say congratulations and goodbye to two outstanding public servants for the residents of New York.

On **Thursday, October 1** , we will be celebrating the retirement of Sen. Rich Funke and Sen. Joe Robach at **The Strathallan’s Cityview Ballroom, located 550 East Ave, Rochester, NY 14607**. The event will run from **5:30 p.m. to 7:30 p.m**.

Information regarding tickets is located below, and contributions made will go toward supporting our full list of 2020 Republican Senate candidates.

If you would like to sign up online, please click the link here: [https://secure.winred.com/nys-senate-republican-campaign-committee/retirement-reception](https://RobOrtt.us4.list-manage.com/track/click?u=8c02d052541198272b8fde278&id=f6ed467cf8&e=9f843ba602)

You may also print and mail the RSVP card below with all pertinent information filled out. Please note – this event is limited to the first 50 RSVPs.

I hope you will join me by coming out to celebrate these two remarkable individuals and support our 2020 roster of Republican Senate candidate.

See you there.

Rob

---

body:
There's no stopping our momentum, friend. |

Friend,

**I'm honored by President Barack Obama's confidence and support.**

In 38 days, Georgia will make a historic statement about the America we believe in -- an America rooted in our nation's founding promise of universal human rights and inspired by the example of President Obama's superb and historic presidency.

At this moment of crisis, America urgently needs unifying, compassionate, and competent leadership -- precisely what President Obama provided during eight years in the White House.

Truly, I miss President Obama's leadership every day. In the Senate I will draw upon his example as inspiration.

First I need your help to win.

**[Friend, will you join President Obama in supporting my campaign and chip in today?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f99/5b2c1286/3aebdba1/25f3b197/132489285/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_joboen?refcode=em_2020_09_26_joboen_k")**

Friend, this Senate race is the most competitive in the country.

I am deadlocked in the polls with David Perdue, Donald Trump's "favorite Senator" and No. 1 enabler.

Mitch McConnell's super PAC has spent more against me than any other Democratic Senate challenger in the country.

**That's because the winner will decide control of the U.S. Senate.**

_These are the stakes. And your support is absolutely essential._

**With President Obama's support, my campaign is building the momentum to generate record turnout here in Georgia.[Can you chip in $25 RIGHT NOW to keep this momentum going all the way to November, friend?](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f99/5b2c1286/3aebdba1/25f3b19d/132489285/VEsB/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_25_joboen?refcode=em_2020_09_26_joboen_k&amount=25")**

Jon

name: Defeat Sen. Cornyn (via MJ Hegar)
subject: He failed
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
We suffered.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f1b/7f51f7bc/4452a71a/4efa5d71/581841815/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | Peter, John Cornyn started receiving briefings on the danger of COVID-19 back in February as a member of the Senate Intelligence Committee.

He spent the next few months downplaying the danger, tweeting bad jokes, and wasting crucial time. Here's the full story about Sen. Cornyn and his COVID-19 failures:

**_He knew:_** COVID-19 was far worse than the flu. **_He said:_** COVID-19 is a "so-called pandemic" with flu-like symptoms for most. **_We needed:_** emergency paid sick leave and to make testing accessible. **_He took a long weekend_** and told us not to panic. **_He failed_** to renew expanded unemployment insurance. **_Families are STILL_** unable to pay their bills and evictions are rising. **_He said:_** we don't know whether kids can get and transmit COVID-19. **_More than 500,000_** kids in America have been infected. This isn't over, and with Sen. Cornyn and his allies still in charge, it won't be over for a very long time. We need a senator who will fight for us, and who will always tell us the truth --**[pitch in to help MJ defeat Sen. Cornyn this November.](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891f1b/7f51f7bc/4452a71a/4efa5d70/581841815/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIxMzIifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-finalcountdown?refcode=email_20200926.1nd__2132__&amount=10")** | _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: Time is running out ⏰ Make sure you’re registered to vote!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
Did you know Indiana is currently worst in the nation for young voter registration? Let's fix that. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=ec8d0b7eb9&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear |*FNAME*|,

This is no ordinary time. We are counting on your vote to send Jackie Walorski home and bring the voice of the people to Washington.

With just 38 days left until Election Day, we wanted to remind you of some important deadlines quickly approaching.
---
| [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=15b74e3028&e=5886ca081d)
---
| Most importantly: The deadline to register to vote in Indiana is Oct. 5. It should take less than 5 minutes to register online, and all you need is your driver’s license or Indiana state identification card.
---
| [REGISTER OR CHECK YOUR VOTER STATUS](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=5293a75fab&e=5886ca081d "REGISTER OR CHECK YOUR VOTER STATUS")
---
| Indiana is currently the [worst in the nation for young voter registration](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=1310323181&e=5886ca081d), but we can change that. |*FNAME*|, will you forward this email to anyone you know -- young or old -- who might not be registered? Remind them that their vote is their voice.

The deadline to request an absentee ballot is Oct. 22, but there’s no reason to delay. Approximately 5,000 ballots from our district have already been received by election officials. Registered voters can [apply for an absentee ballot online.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=84b3a4f101&e=5886ca081d)

Early in-person voting opens Oct. 6 and runs through Nov. 2. If you’re nervous about lines or crowds on Election Day, voting early is a great option. Below you’ll find information about polling locations and hours for each county in Indiana’s 2nd congressional district.
---
|
---
| [LaPorte County](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=d2cc870556&e=5886ca081d "LaPorte County")
---
| [St. Joseph County](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=c1906c0a7c&e=5886ca081d "St. Joseph County")
---
| [Elkhart County](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=57a8c1b494&e=5886ca081d "Elkhart County")
---

We are counting on your vote to send Jackie Walorski home and bring the voice of the people to Washington. With just 38 days left until Election Day, we wanted to remind you of some important deadlines quickly approaching. | | Most importantly: The deadline to register to vote in Indiana is Oct. 5. It should take less than 5 minutes to register online, and all you need is your driver’s license or Indiana state identification card. | "REGISTER OR CHECK YOUR VOTER STATUS" | Indiana is currently the , but we can change that. |FNAME|, will you forward this email to anyone you know -- young or old -- who might not be registered? Remind them that their vote is their voice. The deadline to request an absentee ballot is Oct. 22, but there’s no reason to delay. Approximately 5,000 ballots from our district have already been received by election officials. Registered voters can Early in-person voting opens Oct. 6 and runs through Nov. 2. name: John Kasich
subject: I need your help

body:
There is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the Problem Solvers Caucus [ ](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c6c95fd9b624e4b98560032f5478c36&_e=4dX7Ocobsbv25nv4JWyfsNH1wv-PZsn1iZlhfqKcJHm8ZC76JRjgZll-2ZqybCjxBReb4F2rIKCGlnXyLUjDCKp0H3TAhHfjMutpDA_5BvtUCUtVzIGY_0oeXcI7I_z4eWuCE4p3w11FD1LMhmIrJSOzC69sOK5QZ4I_wv9YdLnU7aibv6C_5gm9qBFCK7q2NpqPLSaCkuvKpx98X47SuR7XSNMTpwvaJytMFHtbUp2WoyHktwk1evYk9DyBBhDIhc0H-0Htj57fvBCqpgALfw%3D%3D) | |
---
Peter - I'm reaching out to you today about a special program we're launching.

We all know how dysfunctional America's politics are these days and that's especially the case with Congress, who have done very little these past years to successfully tackle the biggest challenges that we face.

But there is a bipartisan group of legislators that you may not know about that are part of the "[Problem Solvers Caucus.](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c6c95fd9b624e4b98560032f5478c36&_e=4dX7Ocobsbv25nv4JWyfsAB18EZb_yyhsEyaproUF5ilQBpZUZ8VJ9mBN-TejwJIpO02sWncRgLzuPS7qyEBff9alMwSx0RuNli4VsELDofNw4harnOiw_XHp0FWMqE_sqoqJHFE00pqgM4VvI5j2GuSuJK_cNdFs-03GCG6xy3QMLEArv3DhMXTsQLas6YpM4IZdKpVqWwINuJt2H2e_GLbIzs9dg-Rz_Y2oZQb8XGeQWnqDyMN1zB4aULcT16Sn1ZOdty623PJ5z5m96TtUnar3UWxbrrwP7d1In7ReMM%3D)" They are working tirelessly to build compromise and get our government working to improve the lives of people again.

The program we're launching today aims to raise the funds to make maximum allowable contributions to the Republican members of this group who are in competitive re-election campaigns.

They are doing good and honorable service to our country and with your help, we can ensure they can keep it up. **[Will you consider making a donation right now to help us hit our goal?](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c6c95fd9b624e4b98560032f5478c36&_e=4dX7Ocobsbv25nv4JWyfsGv8HxzLbzxrpYz4tMthBPWWWn_o1GHTRqyir6kBcoyNr4haBxJ7uzkLYnT7vGecgC3AH6MQHeqT6SGjtV78LhhFCmhCeyGD6sh4Ow_dSUuoSlQOIz2fGP1bxv_U7QbmZFOOj1njz1MbjtAp-wQeRNmUGmvEZgEnWnxF1xs8NUc78zd-tftANR4-cn25lGomELqIdNd5O0Od-WqXAhnmOnJHbUhiRPkeS8m_HoU-iyS3EKh8OMsqyCQNfh2y1nMDicUSkrG8ZV3ob7ZUHQVmDvI%3D)**
[Donate Now](http://links.johnkasich.com/u/click?_t=6a3b28686d0a4d77958e12349305a4fe&_m=9c6c95fd9b624e4b98560032f5478c36&_e=4dX7Ocobsbv25nv4JWyfsGv8HxzLbzxrpYz4tMthBPWWWn_o1GHTRqyir6kBcoyNr4haBxJ7uzkLYnT7vGecgIfIPDdoFeOEq4TxXDmLak9RtVqvn5prfFy_WTgK_eWo4kajmzN3DJcA8zgV3PjLYIu4Lz2sljS_2Vxy10dyWkRwaDSft9sYcRZdkmG8acGgdA5glnAYbkn1VChYM23bPW3Iq8PaG7mtyAWlPHns6N3377tb4FPnO-z1KtPnxAsjWx47kKEkFFMxvHWbVliUiH_YLQFlOQfG8h0iLhMrkeQ%3D)
Thank you for your ongoing support!

-John

subject: NEW: DC Republicans buying air time to stop Sri

body:
Friend,

We have just a little over a month until Election Day, and we’ve been doing everything we can to connect with our neighbors and get out the vote.
But we just got news that the Republicans’ largest Super PAC is dropping almost a million dollars into the Houston TV market to try and flood the airwaves before the election.

Help Sri fight back and stay on the air with our own TV ads! >> secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=25

Friend, we know Republicans are afraid of losing this election. Losing this race would threaten their corporate agenda -- and it gets us that much closer to flipping Texas blue, a crippling loss for Republicans.

But we’re facing the last FEC quarterly deadline before the election, and the momentum is clearly on our side ; that’s why we’re seeing so much PAC money this close to Election Day. We need to make sure we have the resources to fight back, and we’re counting on you to get us there. Can you rush us a donation of $5 or whatever you can today?

Chip in $5! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=5
Chip in more! >> https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=25

Republicans know that this seat is flippable. Not only has it been rated a toss-up by experts all over the country, polls show Sri and our opponent Troy Nehls are TIED in this race.

On top of that, Joe Biden is polling within the margin of error, and that means Texas can send him to the White House.
All of this is possible. Texans know we need real change in our district and in the country -- and that starts with electing a proven public servant like Sri Preston Kulkarni this fall.

Join us >> http://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=25

Thank you,
--Team Sri

Can you make it weekly?

Friend -- we’re just 6 weeks away from Election Day, and every dollar that comes through the door is immediately going back out to help us flip this seat. Your grassroots donations have put us on the path to victory, but now we need you to double down.

Can you commit to a $5 or more weekly donation between now and November 3rd? Even $5 goes a long way!

MAKE IT WEEKLY ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=5&recurring=1

Sri Preston Kulkarni is a lifelong public servant and national security expert who has spent his career overseas working to protect Americans here at home. Growing up in Houston, Sri personally experienced the same challenges that our communities are facing today. In Congress, he’ll fight to lower the cost of prescription drugs, stand up to the gun lobby, address climate change, and bring common-sense solutions to Washington.

Help send Sri to Congress! ➜ https://secure.actblue.com/donate/sriq32020w?refcode=em_fr_2020.09.26_b1_ts_all&amount=25

Bringing true representation to TX-22. Learn more at https://sri2020.com/

Paid for by Sri for Congress

SRI FOR CONGRESS
P.O. BOX 898
SUGAR LAND, TX 77487-0898 [#]

If you wish to no longer receive email from us, please unsubscribe: https://email.ngpvan.com/unsubscribeUnique/5ed89bc4-0200-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc/0e7aac77-2900-eb11-96f5-00155d03affc?nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTAvMS84Mjk1MSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIwZTdhYWM3Ny0yOTAwLWViMTEtOTZmNS0wMDE1NWQwM2FmZmMiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=385z0uXWF_Rk-UGG1sTYddWTCAaCCS62Bks6tWq2nU4=&id=117373579 .

name: Team Warner
subject: your weekly update
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| |
| If you would like more information about how to slow and stop the spread of COVID-19, **[take a look at these resources from the Centers for Disease Control (CDC).](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df7/2597190619/VEsH/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.cdc.gov/coronavirus/2019-ncov/index.html")**
---

Derek --

As Mark Warner continues to work hard for every Virginian, our team is committed to sending these weekly updates to keep folks around Virginia up to date with what Mark is focused on in the Senate.

**Here 's what Mark is working on right now:**
* Mark's bi-partisan [_IMPROVE Well-Being for Veterans Act_ is headed to the president's desk](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df6/2597190619/VEsE/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.wtkr.com/news/military/bill-to-provide-more-resources-to-prevent-veteran-suicides-advances") to be signed into law. This bill will provide critical mental health resources to veterans, some of whom may be in crisis. Mark recognizes that the high rate of veteran suicides is a national tragedy, and is focused on making sure that servicemembers have the tools and resources they need to begin the lengthy healing process when they return from deployment.

* As early voting begins around the country, [Mark is pushing the intelligence community to release more information about foreign interference in our elections.](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df5/2597190619/VEsF/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.politico.com/news/2020/09/23/senators-intel-foreign-meddling-420709") Although they are more equipped to counter attacks than in 2016, Mark believes a well informed American electorate is our best defense in keeping our elections fair.

* Mark asked the U.S. Government Accountability Office (GAO) to study the impact of [increased use of subcontracted and contingent workers](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df4/2597190619/VEsC/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://augustafreepress.com/warner-brown-ask-for-study-of-subcontracted-workers-in-21st-century-workforce/") to perform tasks previously done by full-time employees. Mark is concerned that the effects of increased subcontracted workers limits paths for upward mobility in the U.S. workforce.

* On Wednesday, Mark participated in the first Virginia Senate debate against his GOP opponent. Mark discussed his proven track record of delivering tangible results for the Commonwealth, and charted a path forward to ensure we protect progress in Virginia and ensure every Virginian has a fair shot at success. His opponent, on the other hand, proved to Virginians that he will just be another rubber stamp for Donald Trump's agenda if elected.
> -- The next debate will be at Norfolk State University on October 3rd.

* On Thursday, Mark participated in a town hall discussion on gun violence prevention with Rep. Jennifer Wexton, Lori Haas, Senior Director of Advocacy at The Coalition to Stop Gun Violence and Shannon Watts, Founder of Moms Demand Action. [Click here to watch the recording,](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df3/2597190619/VEsD/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://www.facebook.com/MarkWarnerVa/live_videos/") and make sure to "Like" Mark's campaign page on Facebook to stay informed about upcoming town halls and other events.

* Voting has started in Virginia! Mark cast his ballot last Friday. If you're not yet registered to vote, there's still time! Go to [www.iwillvote.com](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df2/2597190619/VEsA/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://iwillvote.com/") to check your registration status and find out where you can vote in your locality.

Thank you for your continued support.

-- Team Warner

[CONTRIBUTE](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df1/2597190619/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyMSJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-db?refcode=20200926_e_2_fl821__&refcode2=cont&amount=5")
---
|
---

[](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881df0/2597190619/VEsO/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://markwarnerva.com")
Friends of Mark Warner
1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213
Williamsburg, VA 23185

[Unsubscribe](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da88/53d9897e/558fab30/1c881dff/2597190619/VEsP/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://act.markwarnerva.com/unsubscribe")

name: Jay Inslee
subject: ICYMI: State leaders and the Supreme Court
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY JAY INSLEE FOR WASHINGTON (D)
body:
No matter what happens in D.C., we can defend democracy here.
| [](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/8912?t=3&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e) Friend, Soon enough, we may not be able to trust the Supreme Court to protect our rights -- from affordable health care to affirmative action, from reproductive rights to gun violence prevention. We likely won't be able to depend on the Supreme Court, the White House, or a GOP-controlled Senate to fight for us. But as Washington's governor, I will fight. That was my solemn commitment before, and I've renewed it tenfold since last Friday evening. As long as I am governor, Washington will protect reproductive rights, take action to end the climate crisis, and lead in the movement to stop gun violence. As governor, I will protect Washingtonians from laws simply meant to trigger Supreme Court hearings and further extreme right-wing values. I will enshrine progressive rights into law here in case of any federal rollback. **Your investment in our campaign today before our end-of-month deadline is an investment in the fight to protect our basic human rights and our democracy. The Republican Governors Association -- like all Republican organizations -- is desperately clamoring to flip as many gubernatorial seats as possible. Their goal is to continue to advance GOP extremist values and control over our democracy. We can't let it happen.** **[We set an aggressive end-of-month goal of $75,000 by midnight on Wednesday: Will you invest in the fight to protect our civil liberties before they even get to the federal level by donating $5 or more right now?](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11951?t=4&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)** _If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_ | | [$5 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11952?t=5&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
| | [$10 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11953?t=6&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
| [$25 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11954?t=7&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
| | [$50 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11955?t=8&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
| [$100 →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11956?t=9&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
| | [OTHER →](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11951?t=10&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)
---
Very truly yours,
Jay
[DONATE](https://act.jayinslee.com/go/11951?t=11&akid=8166%2E868730%2EXcEU0e)

name: =?utf-8?Q?Dani?=
subject: I just wrapped up our big debate
body:
I just finished my first (and likely only) debate with my opponent, Adam Kinzinger. | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/4ede0758efad/i-just-wrapped-up-our-big-debate?e=140a9b81e7)
---
| |
---
| | I just finished my first (and likely only) debate with my opponent, Adam Kinzinger.

This debate presented the stark differences between my opponent and I. I am fighting for a healthcare system that works for all Americans, while he is trying to protect what works for pharmaceutical companies. I support protecting the right to choose, while my opponent wants to repeal Roe v. Wade. I think that the federal government needed to have done more to fight COVID-19 and protect our most vulnerable, while he plays the blame game with China. **For the voters watching the debate, the choice couldn’t have been more clear.**

However, not every single voter watched the debate. That is why we need to spread our message. While my opponent may have corporate PAC money, I have all of you. [Can I count on you to chip in to keep the momentum and help us spread our message across IL-16?](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=a26faeee1e&e=140a9b81e7)

**The debate made it obvious that Adam Kinzinger underestimated us.** But now, our campaign is fully on the Republican Party radar. That is why I need your help.

[Let’s cross the finish line victorious in November, and give the people of IL-16 the type of representation they deserve.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=8ebb29d9a2&e=140a9b81e7)

Thanks,
Dani Brzozowski
Democratic Nominee for Congress, IL-16

PS! [You can watch the full debate here.](https://daniforillinois.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=16d8d19eb3a417b5b09061c0d&id=6518271586&e=140a9b81e7)
---

name: Donald J. Trump
subject: BREAKING: Amy Coney Barrett
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Trump Make America Great Again Committee, a joint fundraising committee authorized by and composed of Donald J
body:
‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌ ‌

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=adac96e92f3a68d74b22a64719c95aa1d08df3897df57809c967049b42f74dc9e8f9e2ba29eab860908e4134554d990139891abddc36c943

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=adac96e92f3a68d74b22a64719c95aa1d08df3897df57809c967049b42f74dc9e8f9e2ba29eab860908e4134554d990139891abddc36c943
Amy Coney Barrett

Friend,

I am proud to present to you our next Supreme Court Justice: Amy Coney Barrett.

I promised you that I would appoint a true American Patriot, who has a demonstrated background of upholding the Constitution and our Nation’s rule of law, and I could think of no one more qualified or right for the job than Amy Coney Barrett.

Confirming Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court is critical to Making America Great Again.

The Democrats have already said they’re going to OBSTRUCT us at every turn. I know we can get this done - it’s critical that we do - but I cannot do it alone. I need your help.

This is our opportunity to take BACK our Country. It’s time to send a message to the Radical Left that the Silent Majority will NO LONGER be silenced and we will FILL THAT SEAT!

This is SO important I’ve activated an 800%-MATCH for the NEXT HOUR.
I’ve requested to see a list of EVERY Patriot who steps up during this critical time. Don’t let me down.

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=adac96e92f3a68d74b22a64719c95aa1d08df3897df57809c967049b42f74dc9e8f9e2ba29eab860908e4134554d990139891abddc36c943
>">Please contribute ANY AMOUNT RIGHT NOW to get on the list I see and your gift will be 800%-MATCHED. >>

http://click.campaigns.rnchq.com/?qs=adac96e92f3a68d74b22a64719c95aa1d08df3897df57809c967049b42f74dc9e8f9e2ba29eab860908e4134554d990139891abddc36c943

Senate Republicans are panicking! |

Friend, the prospect of Mitch McConnell losing power amid a wave of Democratic momentum is giving Republicans a headache: [](https://go.electjon.com/page/m/177e2f85/5b2c1286/3b130895/25f3b1d9/356879081/VEsH/?g=_FNKN1DdY9BfCqelLAMjFg "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/em_2020_09_26_roll_call?refcode=em_2020_09_26_roll_call_img") We are in a battle for control of the Senate, and Republicans are losing their stronghold. Around the country, including right here in Georgia, key GOP seats are at risk of slipping out of Mitch McConnell's grasp.

**_They're panicking._**

That's why Mitch is spending so much money in these key states (_and his super PAC has spent more against Jon Ossoff than any other Democratic Senate candidate!!_). He knows that if he can't cling onto states like Georgia, he'll lose his majority.

**Republicans are starting to seriously doubt their strength in these key states, and the uncertainty is giving them a headache.**

**[So let's remove any uncertainty, shall we? body:
Think like an engineer.
Friends,
**We already proved conventional political wisdom wrong in the primary.** We ran an extremely efficient campaign by taking our message directly to the voters. I spent six months traveling to every corner of this district, pounding the pavement and listening to Texans from all walks of life. And it worked.
**We increased turnout from 2018 by 233% - in the middle of a pandemic.** Our campaign received more than twice the number of votes that MJ Hegar did in the primary. Healthcare for All, Education for All, Real Pay for All - we brought these solutions to the table, and the voters put them within reach.
**Our campaign will use research, data analysis, and disciplined, hard work to win in November.** But we also need help from you. Corporate donors are lining up behind our GOP opponent. They think they can drown us out with waves of campaign cash.
**Let’s prove them wrong.** Every grassroots donation helps us raise our voices a little louder, contact one more hard-to-reach voter, and print one more batch of lawn signs for our volunteers to distribute. **[Invest in our future - contribute $5, $10, or $50 dollars today. clean_body: Think like an engineer. Friends, We already proved conventional political wisdom wrong in the primary. We ran an extremely efficient campaign by taking our message directly to the voters. I spent six months traveling to every corner of this district, pounding the pavement and listening to Texans from all walks of life. And it worked. We increased turnout from 2018 by 233% - in the middle of a pandemic. Our campaign received more than twice the number of votes that MJ Hegar did in the primary. Healthcare for All, Education for All, Real Pay for All - we brought these solutions to the table, and the voters put them within reach. Our campaign will use research, data analysis, and disciplined, hard work to win in November. But we also need help from you. Corporate donors are lining up behind our GOP opponent. They think they can drown us out with waves of campaign cash. Let’s prove them wrong. Every grassroots donation helps us raise our voices a little louder, contact one more hard-to-reach voter, and print one more batch of lawn signs for our volunteers to distribute. = If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately: = = = = = = My mom always says, “possibilities are endless.” And she’s right - we just need the right solutions. I know we can solve these problems together. Let’s roll up our sleeves and get to work! Donna Imam = = = Donna started her tech career as the first female design engineer ever hired in the 100 year history of Duncan Metering. Since then she's led billion dollar product lines, from computers used by millions worldwide, to microprocessors found in everything from washing machines to commercial jets. Her campaign platform is simple. It rebuilds the crumbling foundation of this country. It lifts up every American - the people who work every day and carry America on their shoulders - so we can all flourish together, continue to innovate, and lead economically. To learn more, Paid for by Vote Donna US Congress Vote Donna US Congress P.O. Box 2321 Cedar Park, TX 78630 United States Click here to Follow our campaign on , , and . body:
| |
---

| | |
---
| Derek, President Trump is hours away from announcing his nomination to fill the Supreme Court vacancy, and we need your help in ensuring our U.S. Senators in New Hampshire **do their jobs** and **FILL THAT SEAT!**
---
---
| | | [ ](https://click.mlsend.com/link/c/YT0xNTE4ODY2MDMwMjI1NTI4MDYzJmM9dDlyMSZlPTE5MjgmYj00MTc1OTY4NTgmZD1iOGU2bjJu.1C-28vAmQLT9xwHAmn9QItEELYQ8hGqc7C63NOF4JEg)
---
| |
---

subject: Last chance!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Betsy Rader
body:
| | | |
---
---
_**Last call to sign up for Betsy 's Amazing Race!**_ This will be our last fundraising event before Election Day, so I hope you are able to chip in and join us tomorrow! [RSVP here](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/jL8i2SEbuH43lLfI80SZmLSxlz6p7XcBWgYVU-qjU8c=) or contact Ethan ([ethan@betsyrader4ohio.com](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/MyMOFE-DQNyYucRSCACdkhTMI460uDb330RCLptcwH4=?subject=Betsy's%20Amazing%20Race)) More details below --> _*we 'll only have enough race packets for those who RSVP, so if you're planning to attend, please let us know!*_ [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/jL8i2SEbuH43lLfI80SZmLSxlz6p7XcBWgYVU-qjU8c=) **What is it?** I grew up working at a race track, and now I'm in a competitive race for State Senate. So I decided to find a fun, socially-distant way for folks to support the campaign, while exploring the district in their very own "racecar" **The Amazing Race is a scavenger hunt around State Senate District 18.** Hop in the car and head to the starting line where you'll get your first clue. Solve puzzles that lead to locations and more clues. Finish and find out if you had the most points to win!I **Date:** September 27th -- **TOMORROW!** **Time:** You will be assigned a start time between 2 and 3 pm **Location:** Meet and begin at the Geauga Democratic Headquarters _(2420 Kinsman Rd, Newbury Township, Ohio)_ then use your car to follow clues to locations around State Senate District 18! We want everyone to be safe on the road. Winners will be chosen for best team name and best decorated "racecar!" Fastest time does not mean you win! Take it slow and enjoy State Senate District 18! _**Tickets:**_ _All kids are free_ [Volunteer: $25](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/yPeNP0uOBskcqw6CCcFnriEafunRFk2LzhULMZJcRaQ=) [Individual: $50](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/yPeNP0uOBskcqw6CCcFnriEafunRFk2LzhULMZJcRaQ=) [Multiple in a car: $100 ](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/yPeNP0uOBskcqw6CCcFnriEafunRFk2LzhULMZJcRaQ=) _(not including children-they 're free!)_ [Sponsor: $250](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/yPeNP0uOBskcqw6CCcFnriEafunRFk2LzhULMZJcRaQ=) [VIP: $500](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/yPeNP0uOBskcqw6CCcFnriEafunRFk2LzhULMZJcRaQ=) **_ Hope to see you there!_** _-Betsy_
* * *
[](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/38Z8p8PamtGPDW1FTCTOnuuLQJvlxjNBt8oj_V_j9zQ=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/qMFPRT_H2gWUcqiu-znj7xFoTc7oN11jiY30-luEguA=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/wZlYwU7V8S5zI8G0t7-MU5itMZwoSEfweSJwRRfs1Js=) [](https://act.myngp.com/el/uDvAeC1AQKPLQrtjulyR5Y-ESm8lR7b5nduSCU34ACs=/I10AFYxGdos6WFiP-Nb_mlIosA_p7vWoeEKAZR5KGfY=)

Have you seen the news?

President Trump OFFICIALLY nominated Amy Coney Barrett to serve on the U.S. Supreme Court. She brings a record of putting the Constitution — not left-wing judicial activism — first.

In the days ahead, she will face intense attacks from the fake news media and Democrat politicians like Jeanne Shaheen. _They will do whatever it takes to stop her confirmation and end our Senate majority — and we must hold the line_.

In fact, the radical left is telling us exactly what they will do if they get the chance: They will PACK the Supreme Court with radical liberal judges if they win the Senate majority!

**We’re the last line of defense — and if we can FLIP this U.S. Senate seat — we will guarantee a Republican Senate majority. We can guarantee a pro-Constitution judiciary**.

**_[That’s why I’m asking each of my TOP supporters to chip in $100, $50, or even just $10 RIGHT NOW to help us defend Judge Barrett and FLIP this seat!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4fcf4d4c4c5e6c9/db7b579452c6ac77c3d6b838967d376c/33153)_** [ ](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4fcf4d4c4c5e6c9/e4d7d73ca477cb97c3d6b838967d376c/33153) [Rush your Support for Amy Coney Barrett!](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4fcf4d4c4c5e6c9/638a5f44aa8140fcc3d6b838967d376c/33153) The stakes are higher than they’ve ever been before, and we need supporters like you to stand with us. I’m personally asking you, Peter, to join me in the fight for the Constitution and America. _**[Click to contribute](http://ci.criticalimpact.com/go/1/cc1d33a50c62df3e322761119fed00b9/33153/a4fcf4d4c4c5e6c9/7a63723e341cdbf3c3d6b838967d376c/33153)**_ today.

FILL THAT SEAT!

Friend,

My father just announced that Amy Coney Barrett is his Supreme Court nominee, and he knew that he wanted to be with the great American People of Pennsylvania immediately after.

Unlike his opponent, who only works from 8:00 AM to 9:00 AM, President Trump is out on the campaign trail EVERY DAY.

He is speaking RIGHT NOW about how critical it is that we FILL THAT SEAT. Are you watching? This is our chance to Make America Great Again. This is our chance to show the Democrats that REAL Americans are rejecting their SOCIALIST agenda.

The Left wants to pack the court with radical activists who will alter the course of our Nation for decades to come, and YOU are the only one who can stop them. My father needs your support now more than ever, and I know you won’t let him down.

I’m printing him the FINAL donor list of EVERY Patriot who steps up during his speech right now. If you step up in the NEXT HOUR, I’ll make sure YOUR NAME is on the list.

name: =?utf-8?Q?Pat=20Hackett?=
subject: The integrity of the Supreme Court and our democracy
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Pat Hackett for Congress
body:
President Trump’s nominee should not be confirmed before the election to preserve our democracy and the rule of law. | | | | [ ](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=9fa04767a8&e=5886ca081d)
---
| | | Dear Friend,

Less than a day after Justice Ginsburg passed, Jackie Walorski called for President Trump to nominate Judge Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court. This week, Jackie called on Indiana Senators Todd Young and Mike Braun to confirm Amy Coney Barrett without delay.

**[Jackie Walorski’s comments are shamefully hypocritical.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=7087b4db2c&e=5886ca081d)** The Republicans refused to consider President Obama’s nominee to the Court when there was a vacancy 10 months before an election. But now they are doing the opposite 39 days before the election _when voting has already started_. This blatant disregard for the democratic process and lack of basic integrity damages our country, the Supreme Court, and Congress.

**[Jackie Walorski’s actions are unconscionable during the Covid-19 pandemic.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=6b70b0b491&e=5886ca081d) **The people of this district continue to fight for their lives and their jobs amidst the worst global health crisis since 1918 and the worst economic disaster since 1929. Congress has not passed a Covid-19 relief bill in six months but now Jackie Walorski is calling on Senators Todd Young and Mike Braun to push through a Supreme Court nomination in less than six weeks. In addition, the Trump administration has filed a lawsuit to strike down the Affordable Care Act, with Supreme Court arguments scheduled for November 10. Jackie Walorski has repeatedly and intentionally voted to repeal the ACA. If they succeed, millions of people could be without health insurance at a time they need it the most. This is a callous disregard for human life.

[No nominee should be confirmed before the election.](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=69dd4e4cca&e=5886ca081d) The Supreme Court could be called upon to decide the result of this election itself. President Trump’s nominee should not be confirmed before the election to preserve our democracy and the rule of law.

[**Please help me fight for the integrity of the Supreme Court and our democracy.**](https://foundationbluemedia.us3.list-manage.com/track/click?u=c156e612ce88db66e08a28197&id=3399dff9d0&e=5886ca081d)

name: Mark Warner for Senate
subject: The Supreme Court is on the ballot, Derek
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner
body:
|
---

| | **_The future of the Supreme Court is on the ballot in November, Derek._**

Right now, the Senate is our last line of defense against Donald Trump stacking the Supreme Court with a 6-3 conservative majority. We need strong leaders like Mark Warner who are willing to fight to prevent the President from ramming a nominee through before Election Day -- _against the express wishes of both Ruth Bader Ginsburg and the American people._ | [](https://act.markwarnerva.com/page/m/7e85da89/53d9897e/5589ab01/1c881de3/2631766311/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjgyMyJ9/?g=fQCtPq_HJ6FdDGwS5GeylnA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/warner-future?refcode=20200926_f_1_nd__823__&refcode2=graphic&amount=5")
---
Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are trying to push their Supreme Court nominee through just weeks before the election, breaking the precedent their own party set in 2016.

And if we do succeed in pushing the vote until after Election Day, we **need** Mark's vote in the Senate on the eventual nominee. Mark's GOP opponent has already promised he'll be a rubber stamp for whoever Trump chooses -- _he made that promise without even knowing the nominee._

**_Virginians deserve more than a rubber stamp, and America deserves more than Trump 's plot to push through a nominee in the last days before the election._**

**[Contribute today if you can. clean_body: | | | The future of the Supreme Court is on the ballot in November, Derek. Right now, the Senate is our last line of defense against Donald Trump stacking the Supreme Court with a 6-3 conservative majority. We need strong leaders like Mark Warner who are willing to fight to prevent the President from ramming a nominee through before Election Day -- against the express wishes of both Ruth Bader Ginsburg and the American people. | "" Mitch McConnell and Donald Trump are trying to push their Supreme Court nominee through just weeks before the election, breaking the precedent their own party set in 2016. And if we do succeed in pushing the vote until after Election Day, we need Mark's vote in the Senate on the eventual nominee. Mark's GOP opponent has already promised he'll be a rubber stamp for whoever Trump chooses -- he made that promise without even knowing the nominee. Virginians deserve more than a rubber stamp, and America deserves more than Trump 's plot to push through a nominee in the last days before the election. "" Thank you, Team Warner "" | Friends of Mark Warner 1490-5A Quarterpath Road #213 Williamsburg, VA 23185 "" | | Paid for by Friends of Mark Warner

name: =?utf-8?Q?Genevieve=20Collins?=
subject: Week in Review
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY COLLINS FOR TEXAS, INC**
body:
| | | |
---
| | |
---
|
---
| Peter,

With less than 40 days until the election (can you believe it?!), we're continuing to fire on all cylinders. We've got volunteers and interns making calls, delivering signs, and knocking on doors each and every day. [If you want to get involved, please follow this link](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=39e60468a6&e=68aaeb0998), and we'll get in touch!

**This week, we released our latest TV ad, "Promise."** **Colin Allred campaigned as "an independent voice** for North Texas - not a party line politician." But **he broke that promise as soon as he got to DC** , voting with Nancy Pelosi 100% of the time. I know that sounds hard to believe, but it's a fact.

I'm not a politician; I'm a businesswoman who will solve problems and help get people back to work. **If you haven't watched this ad yet, you can check it out below. **
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=6f1952c5bf&e=68aaeb0998)
---
| I also **joined forces with Dan Crenshaw and a group of young, dynamic Texas congressional candidates to release "Texas Reloaded."** This ad has been billed as the "greatest joint political ad of all time," and I'm truly amazed by all of the positive coverage it has received over the last few days.

**It was a ton of fun to work with this group of candidates who share my belief that we must defend our common sense Texas way of life** from the progressive agenda.

Check out "Texas Reloaded" below! I hope you enjoy watching it as much as I enjoyed making it.
---
| [ ](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=1cdbfb019a&e=68aaeb0998 "Texas Reloaded")
---
|
---
| Finally, as I touched on at the beginning of this email, **we are remaining very active out in the community.**

Often that means masks and social distancing, but we've adapted to the realities of campaigning in 2020, and my campaign team will not be deterred.

One of the events I went to this week was a candidate forum in Garland, that was held for members of the Vietnamese American community. **I'm running to represent all residents of District 32**, and I enjoy the opportunity to participate in events such as this.
---
| Our final quarter of fundraising ends in just a couple days, and it's critical that we report a strong number. So[ if you have been thinking of supporting our campaign financially, now is the time](https://gcforcongress.us8.list-manage.com/track/click?u=eb0e2b7e83008912623ba9a3e&id=6b11d7aa18&e=68aaeb0998) to do so.

Thank you and I hope you have a great weekend!

God bless,
---
|
---
| Genevieve Collins

Republican Nominee
Texas Congressional District 32
---

name: Dick Durbin
subject: Send these doctors to the Senate
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Friends of Dick Durbin
body:
#
Peter,
We're in the middle of an unprecedented pandemic. Now more than ever, we need to send leaders to the Senate who will put public health first -- not more of the same partisan politics.
That's exactly the kind of leadership we can expect from Dr. Al Gross and Dr. Barbara Bollier.
These doctors know that we should be following the facts and science during this pandemic. They also know that we should be expanding access to health care -- not ripping it away.
**[Will you make a $5 contribution now to elect Dr. Al Gross in Alaska and Dr. Barbara Bollier in Kansas? Every dollar you donate today helps these candidates flip the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200925-doctor-slate?refcode=em200925i_1004&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

Peter, winning these seats is crucial in the fight to take back the Senate from Mitch McConnell and his failed Republican majority. And the latest polls show that both of these races are TIED -- because even in traditionally conservative states like Alaska and Kansas, voters are sick and tired of the extreme partisanship and dysfunction they see from the GOP.
I'm working hard to not only win my race in Illinois in November, but help elect incredible candidates like Al and Barbara to join me in this must-win fight for our future in the Senate.
**[Rush in your $5 contribution right now to help elect Dr. Al Gross and Dr. Barbara Bollier -- and finally put an end to Mitch McConnell and the GOP's control of the Senate.](https://act.durbinforsenate.%3D%3D/?g=ofPncVH8x8VcsCmaF7wmZzA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/dd-200925-doctor-slate?refcode=em200925i_1004&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=34223&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&addr1=&addr2=&city=Englewood&state=FL&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**

name: Patty Murray
subject: This is the only way to flip the Senate
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY PEOPLE FOR PATTY MURRAY
body:
#

Team,
Just like you, I am excited -- beyond excited -- about the prospects of flipping red seats blue in November.
But let's be clear -- the only way we're going to take back control of the Senate from Mitch McConnell and the GOP is if we also **defend all of our Democratic Senate incumbents.**
As part of my Sprint to 2020 program, I am helping support Democratic Senators in crucial 2020 re-election fights -- including Gary Peters, Jeanne Shaheen, Doug Jones, and Tina Smith. These Democratic champions need our support right now so they can win these pivotal races.
**[With so much on the line, winning the Senate majority has never been more important. Rush in a $5 contribution to help re-elect my Democratic Senate colleagues in 2020.](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200925-incumbent-slate?refcode=em200925i_489&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Right now, Republicans are challenging our affordable health care laws at the Supreme Court, threatening coverage for millions of patients with pre-existing conditions across the country.
We need a Democratic Senate so we can put a stop to these attacks on patients' health care and move our country forward, not backward. And this is only one example -- action on climate change, reproductive rights, support for working families, and so much more is at stake.
**[The GOP is targeting these Democratic Senators in November -- and Gary, Jeanne, Doug, and Tina need our support today so they can fight back and win. Will you make a $5 contribution right now to help re-elect our Democratic incumbents?](https://act.pattymurray.?g=KnQfVcQot1BdNp6fCr3xM1A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/pm-200925-incumbent-slate?refcode=em200925i_489&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=98208&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Everett&state=WA&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Thank you,
Patty

name: Amy McGrath
subject: Mitch McConnell has to be stopped. Help it happen.
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
Hi there,
In just a few hours, we're expecting President Trump to nominate his third Supreme Court justice.
But Mitch McConnell's plan to jam this nomination through has been in motion for a week. He went into overdrive only a few hours after Justice Ginsburg's death to line up the votes for the nominee before the election, no matter who it is. He made it clear from the start that everything he said four years ago simply doesn't matter anymore--what he'd described as an unbreakable rule of our democracy can be broken the minute doing so helps his political party.
This is who Mitch McConnell is, and it's why I'm running to beat him.
It makes me angry that Mitch shows such an urgency to grow his own power, but won't lift a finger to help Americans struggling during a pandemic. I'm furious that, because of this Supreme Court pick, he's going to get another shot at ending the Affordable Care Act and throwing half a million Kentuckians off of their insurance.
And I'm very worried about what it means for America that we can't trust a thing our Senate majority leader says in public.
**There 's no sugarcoating it: Mitch is destroying our democracy before our very eyes. He must be defeated in November, and I need all the help I can get to make it happen. That's why Senator Hassan suggested I ask you directly.**

[**Please chip in $3 or as much as you can before our final quarterly FEC deadline, and let 's fight for our democracy with everything we've got.**](https://act.maggiehassan.com/page/m/f7fc569/2a380d31/20da9dac/f0bbc0/810028034/VEsH/p/eyJlM3NnWVdKd1lXZGxJSDE5IjoiMjAyMF9td2g0bWNncmF0aCIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiZTIwMjAwOTI2X01XSDRBTV9uYSIsImUzc2dURkJCUVZGMVpYSjVVM1J5YVc1bklIMTkiOiIzLDI1LDUwLDEwMCwyNTAifQ%3D%3D/?g=YHsLejpTVzRXNXNZdVQ0tHA "https://secure.actblue.com/contribute/page/2020_mwh4mcgrath?refcode=e20200926_MWH4AM_na&amounts=3,25,50,100,250")

name: =?utf-8?Q?Jason=20Maulucci?=
subject: Help us catch up
body:
We’re coming up on an important filing deadline and we're behind our goal. |
---
| | [ ](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=eb581809ea&e=19cebfe173)
---
| Friend,
---
| As you know, Governor Scott’s top focus has been doing the job we hired him to do -- leading our state through these uncertain times -- not campaigning. In fact, until earlier this month, there was no campaign staff at all. Our opponent, on the other hand, has been raising money and campaigning for months. [**It is critical we catch up so that we have the resources needed to win this race.**](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=dbef3de0b4&e=19cebfe173) We’re coming up on an important filing deadline and we’re $9,114 short of our goal. As people begin to cast their ballots, [can we count on you to help us get our message out to as many Vermonters as possible?](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=6fb70a37c7&e=19cebfe173) We’ve been fortunate to have Governor Scott’s strong leadership throughout these last several months. As we rebuild and recover, it’s critical that we reelect the Governor so our priorities remain growing the economy, making Vermont more affordable and protecting the most vulnerable. Thank you for your continued support.
Jason Maulucci
Campaign Manager
[Phil Scott for Vermont](https://philscott.us13.list-manage.com/track/click?u=bbb0245bb16226cd6570f0156&id=0879622a4f&e=19cebfe173)

name: Ed Markey
subject: Will you video-chat with me and Elizabeth on Tuesday?
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren Democrats
body:
It's never been more important to elect Democrats at every level of government, and Elizabeth of course has a plan for that. Her campaign is helping organize at the grassroots level for candidates acr | | | [](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b6/45c30650/1c1a0da97/66e8efb2/3052652733/VEsH/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsIkpTVm1hWEp6ZEc1aGJXVWxKUT09IjoiIiwiSlNWc1lYTjBibUZ0WlNVbCI6IiIsIkpTVjZhWEFsSlE9PSI6IjE4MzI2In0%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://elizabethwarren.com?source=em-header&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&firstname=&lastname=&zip=18326")
---
Elizabeth Warren is one hell of a fighter.

I'm honored to serve by her side in the United States Senate, and I'm proud to call her a friend.

Every time we talk, I'm even more energized and inspired to keep up the fight. And right now, we all need as much energy and inspiration as we can get. So I thought you might like to join one of those conversations with me and Elizabeth.

**[Elizabeth and I are hosting a virtual grassroots fundraiser on Tuesday, September 29 at 6:30 p.m. Eastern. If you donate $2 or whatever you are able to give to support Warren Democrats and her re-election, you can tune in and join the discussion.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b6/45c30650/1c1a0da97/66e8efb5/3052652733/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtLXNlcHRmciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMjFGX0VPUV9JTlZfR18yMDIwMDkyNl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em-septfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV21F_EOQ_INV_G_20200926_V1S1_P")**

It's never been more important to elect Democrats at every level of government, and Elizabeth of course has a plan for that. Her campaign is helping organize at the grassroots level for candidates across the country who know that we need bold changes to put power in the hands of the people.

Everything is on the line this November. _But we don't agonize -- we organize._ If we fight like never before, we will win like never before.

I'm grateful to be in this fight alongside Elizabeth -- and alongside you. So I hope you'll be able to join me and Elizabeth next Tuesday night.

**[If you can, please make a donation to help re-elect Elizabeth, support Warren Democrats across the country, and reserve your spot to see me and her at Tuesday's virtual grassroots fundraiser.](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b6/45c30650/1c1a0da97/66e8efb5/3052652733/VEsEAw/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtLXNlcHRmciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMjFGX0VPUV9JTlZfR18yMDIwMDkyNl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em-septfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV21F_EOQ_INV_G_20200926_V1S1_P")**

Thank you for being a part of this movement.

\- Ed

Ed Markey
U.S. Senator

| [**DONATE NOW**](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/page/m/285251b6/45c30650/1c1a0da97/66e8efb5/3052652733/VEsEAg/p/eyJKU1ZsYldGcGJDVWwiOiJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSIsImUzc2dkWEpzSUgxOSI6ImV3LWVtLXNlcHRmciIsImUzc2djbVZtWTI5a1pTQjlmUT09IjoiRU1WMjFGX0VPUV9JTlZfR18yMDIwMDkyNl9WMVMxX1AifQ%3D%3D/?g=4qwscq_HJ6FcsC0VbCsFfMA "https://secure.elizabethwarren.com/donate/ew-em-septfr?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&refcode=EMV21F_EOQ_INV_G_20200926_V1S1_P")

subject: WATCH LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump announces his nomination for the Supreme Court!
body:
In just a few minutes, President Trump will announce his nomination for the 115th Supreme Court Justice of the United States. | | | | [ ](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=e8c66c89fe&e=3ee4985eea)
---
| The White House • September 26, 2020
---
| | |
# **WATCH LIVE at 5 p.m. ET: President Trump announces his nomination for the Supreme Court!**

**In just a few minutes,** President Trump will announce his nomination for the 115th Supreme Court Justice of the United States.

**Like Justices Neil Gorsuch** and Brett Kavanaugh—along with the hundreds of Federal judges that President Trump has appointed to the lower courts—this justice will uphold the rule of law and honor our U.S. Constitution _as written_. Together, these judges will make a lasting impact on America’s courts for decades to come.

**Tune in live as President Trump** announces his THIRD Supreme Court nominee. A video of the ceremony will also be available after the event using the link below.

**🎬**[** _WATCH President Trump’s announcement LIVE at 5 p.m. ET_**](https://whitehouse.us19.list-manage.com/track/click?u=4da4828d48b4efa4fc1138955&id=a54a9c37f3&e=3ee4985eea)
---
|

body:
I wanted you to hear it first. The President has nominated Amy Coney Barrett, a rock-solid conservative for the Supreme Court vacancy. name: =?utf-8?Q?Kyle=20Hupfer=2C=20Chairman=2C=20IN=20GOP?=
subject: Support President Trump's SCOTUS nominee!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by the Indiana Republican Party
body:
President Trump just nominated fellow Hoosier Amy Coney Barrett and we need to show our support! | | | [View this email in your browser](https://mailchi.mp/indiana/thankful-469766?e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
| | [ ](https://indgop.us11.list-manage.com/track/click?u=89fb3de929a99eecb88e6fb27&id=65f48b6255&e=1acd9bb3d6)
---
id:2020-04-23-15:43:59:705t
---
| Hoosier Republican,

Have you heard the news?

President Trump nominated an _excellent_ Constitutional conservative to serve on the Supreme Court, and we can’t miss our chance to confirm her.

It’s a fellow Hoosier – Amy Coney Barrett! Judge Barrett calls South Bend home and is a professor at Notre Dame. President Trump nominated her to the Seventh Circuit Court of Appeals in 2017 and she was confirmed with a bipartisan majority in the Senate.

Barrett brings a clear record of interpreting the Constitution as written, not as a judicial activist legislating from the bench.

_That’s the way it should be — the way our Founding Fathers intended it to be_.

Over the coming weeks, she will undoubtedly be the victim of a relentless and unfounded smear campaign from radical leftist Democrats, but the Indiana Republican Party remains steadfast in our support of President Trump’s pick.

President Trump has fulfilled his constitutional obligation to fill a Supreme Court vacancy and Hoosiers can rest assured that their senators, Todd Young and Mike Braun, will do their duty as well.

Amy Coney Barrett’s addition to the Supreme Court will cement a constructionist majority for years to come. One that will follow the laws set forth in our Constitution, as written.

Of course, the liberals are not happy, and are doing everything in their power to convince the Senate not to confirm Judge Barrett. The radical left is even threatening to pack the court, abolish the electoral college, add states to the union, and even impeach the President again if they ever return to power!

**To help Judge Barrett, I’m asking every single patriot to contribute now and help us defend her!

Let the United States Senate know that we MUST confirm Judge Amy Coney Barrett NOW!**
---

Thanks for your support,

Kyle Hupfer
Chairman, Indiana GOP
