name: Mike Huckabee
subject: ALERT: We have our nominee
body:
| | President Trump annouces Ruth Bader Ginsburg’s replacement!
---
[ ](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p200926apl01nd&n=1) Image courtesy of C-SPAN.org
| Peter, and here we go. In Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump has chosen a first-rate intellect, a woman of deep Christian faith, and a tried and true warrior for our Constitution. I have no doubt whatsoever that she will safeguard America’s most cherished values and institutions, most notably our God-given right to practice our faith openly and freely. Now, it’s crystal clear what you and I must do over the next 5 weeks. **While those on the Left outrageously threaten to “pack the Courts” in retribution, we must pack the voting booths on November 3.** We’ve always said our focus is broader than the White House, and this is why. Our enthusiasm right now will be noticed by every U.S. senator up for reelection. They’ll know that we’ll be voting based upon their confirmation vote. And if the vote doesn’t happen before November 3, who we elect to the U.S. Senate is even more important. It will be the difference between a Justice Barrett and someone more in the mold of AOC. **[So, more strongly than I’ve ever asked before, I ask you to support My Faith Votes with a donation. To multiply your impact it will be matched, dollar for dollar, up to $550,000.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p200926apl01nd&n=2)** It’s a sad reality that the Court matters so much in our society today. The secular fringe has become so aggressive, both in our culture and in elected government, that the Court has become the backstop. For example, as more and more unborn children are destroyed in the womb each year, it’s a grim reminder of the negative ramifications of a radical Court. It’s vital that we get this right. **[With so much at stake and the lines so clearly drawn, please make an urgent donation to My Faith Votes. We are so close to the finish line, and your ongoing support is critical.](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p200926apl01nd&n=3)** [](https://secured.myfaithvotes.org/p200926apl01?e=be53806c85fc17bd685e1e4c4d896e92&utm_source=myfaithvotes&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=p200926apl01nd&n=4) Sincerely, Mike Huckabee

In Amy Coney Barrett, President Trump has chosen a first-rate intellect, a woman of deep Christian faith, and a tried and true warrior for our Constitution. I have no doubt whatsoever that she will safeguard America’s most cherished values and institutions, most notably our God-given right to practice our faith openly and freely. Now, it’s crystal clear what you and I must do over the next 5 weeks. While those on the Left outrageously threaten to “pack the Courts” in retribution, we must pack the voting booths on November 3. We’ve always said our focus is broader than the White House, and this is why. Our enthusiasm right now will be noticed by every U.S. senator up for reelection. They’ll know that we’ll be voting based upon their confirmation vote. And if the vote doesn’t happen before November 3, who we elect to the U.S. Senate is even more important. And what is Nancy Pelosi focused on?

name: BetoORourke.com
subject: Texas is within reach
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Powered by People, [poweredxpeople
body:
A new poll showed that Joe Biden is only three points behind Trump in Texas. With your support, we can reach as many voters in Texas as possible to help them turn out and elect a Democratic majority.
#
We're coming up on an important end-of-quarter at the end of September — our last big report before Election Day. And, unfortunately, because of how money in politics works, this is the best way to show the national stage that there is momentum happening in Texas this year.
[**We know there’s momentum happening on the ground. Our phone banks show us that every week. Can you help us show the rest of the country just how flippable Texas is by chipping in a few dollars towards our phone bank efforts before this crucial FEC deadline?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43093?refcode=ema20200926-106660&t=20&akid=106660%2E444211%2E8SyUAa)
**[Contribute $8](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43093?refcode=ema20200926-106660&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=21&akid=106660%2E444211%2E8SyUAa)**
A recent poll showed Joe Biden is only three points behind in Texas. This is the closest a Democrat has been to winning Texas’ electoral college votes in years. We really have a chance to win. But now is when we have to put our heads down and get to work so we can close that gap.
In the last few months, Powered by People volunteers have accomplished some amazing feats. We’ve registered over 90,000 new Texas voters. We’ve made and sent nearly 40 million calls and texts to voters. We’ve worked with some amazing State House candidates to increase voter turnout in their districts. All of this was accomplished by grassroots supporters like you.
[**There are 38 days until Election Day. 38 days to mobilize more volunteers, reach more voters, and make up those 3 points for Joe Biden. Can you make a donation of $3, $8, $38 or whatever you can spare right now to help us show there is momentum on the ground here in Texas?**](https://act.betoorourke.com/go/43093?refcode=ema20200926-106660&t=22&akid=106660%2E444211%2E8SyUAa)
Thanks for your support,
Powered by People

name: Team MJ Hegar
subject: URGENT: Trump's nominee
disclaimer_text: Paid for by MJ for Texas
body:
Please read this now.

|
---
[](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb0/2685836846/VEsH/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/logo?refcode=emaillogo&amount=5")

| | The President just nominated Amy Coney Barrett to the Supreme Court, and **John Cornyn is committed to rushing her through to a vote.**

More than 200 days before the 2016 election, Sen. Cornyn argued that "the American people need to decide who is going to make this appointment." **But now, just 38 days from Election Day 2020, he 's decided that his Washington allies like Mitch McConnell should have full control.** | [PITCH IN TO FIGHT BACK](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb7/2685836846/VEsE/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__&amount=10")
---
Mitch McConnell and John Cornyn are going to do whatever they can to push Donald Trump's nominee through to a lifetime appointment on the most powerful court in the land -- the court that will decide for generations:
* Whether or not insurance companies will be able to once again discriminate against those with preexisting conditions, and leave them with sky-high medical debt

* Whether or not _Roe v. Wade_ remains the law of the land and our reproductive freedom stays intact

* Whether or not we'll defend our civil rights and strive to ensure every single American is treated equally under the law

* Whether or not we'll allow discrimination against LGBTQ+ Americans

* Whether or not we'll allow politicians to cling on to power by disenfranchising Americans, rolling out blatant voter suppression tactics, and gerrymandering districts

**The stakes are too high to stand by. Pitch in to send a clear message to Sen. Cornyn that Texans have had it with his hypocrisy and political games, and help defeat him in November.**
_If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:_
---
**[Express donate $5>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb6/2685836846/VEsF/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__&amount=5")**
**[Express donate $10>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb5/2685836846/VEsC/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__&amount=10")**
**[Express donate $25>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb4/2685836846/VEsD/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?express_lane=true&refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__&amount=25")**

**[Or, donate a different amount>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eaa/2685836846/VEsB/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__")**
When Sen. Cornyn stonewalled a Supreme Court nomination in 2016, he said "it's not about the personality, it's about the principle." It's more clear than ever that for John Cornyn, his principles mean squat when they get in the way of his politics. **It 's time to retire him, and we need your help to do it.**

\-- Team MJ

[DONATE](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5eb7/2685836846/VEsO/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-supremecourt?refcode=email_20200926.4nd__2206__&amount=10")
---

|
---

| It's clear we need a real leader for Texas and a Senate that prioritizes our health care. **[More than ever, we're relying on online fundraising to keep building the campaign we need to win in November, and we greatly appreciate your continued support>>](https://secure.mjfortexas.com/page/m/64891ce6/7f51f7bc/44617de0/4efa5ea9/2685836846/VEsP/p/eyJKU1ZOUVVsTVNVNUhTVVFsSlE9PSI6IjIyMDYifQ%3D%3D/?g=f7VweDpTVzRduSR3BPpGv5A "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/mj-covidfooter?refcode=2206&amount=10")**

However, we know this is not an easy time for many. name: Jacky Rosen
subject: it's all on the line
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rosen for Nevada
body:
#
Team,
This will surely be the most important and consequential election in modern history.
It's all on the line in November: affordable health care, a competent response to the pandemic, reproductive rights, climate action, the Supreme Court, and so much more.
**We absolutely must defeat President Trump -- but that alone isn 't enough. We need to take back control of the Senate from Mitch McConnell and his failed Republican majority.**
**[I'm setting a $25,000 end-of-quarter fundraising goal to help keep this fight on track. Can I count on you to pitch in $5 or whatever you can before the September 30 deadline?](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200926-eoq?refcode=em200926i_4633&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")**
Losing this 2020 fight is not an option. There is just too much at stake. And the loss of Supreme Court Justice Ruth Bader Ginsburg has only made it even more clear.
We need a Democratic White House and Democratic Senate so we can finally move this country forward and undo the damage caused by President Trump and Mitch McConnell.
[**Our future is hanging in the balance -- will you make helping Democrats win in November a top priority? Contribute $5 or any amount right now to help meet this crucial goal.**](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200926-eoq?refcode=em200926i_4633&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")
Thank you,
Jacky

****[Contribute](https://secure.rosenfornevada.%3D/?g=Nljwc1Nw52ha-mlzdBXxLUA "https://secure.actblue.com/donate/jr-200926-eoq?refcode=em200926i_4633&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=89053&firstname=&lastname=&addr1=&addr2=&city=Henderson&state=NV&phone=&employer=&occupation=")****
